analysis_commentary: Replicate of current-best parameters: legal_mass 0.49 vs baseline 0.838 (-41%), arena 0.52 vs 0.55 — only 4W/0L/96D, no promotion vs baseline 1× promotion. Same params, full 900s, no collapse, but goal-1 metrics regressed substantially. Confirms baseline was partly noise-lucky in build-393's high-variance regime.
